Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Old Age Security Act (definition of income)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Old Age Security Act (definition of income)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends a reference to the Budget Implementation Act, 2021, No. 1 in the definition of income in the Old Age Security Act.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Subparagraph (c)(i.1) of the definition income in section 2 of the Old Age Security Act is replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (i.1)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount of the payment under the program referred to in section 275 of the Budget Implementation Act, 2021, No. 1,

Definition.Text: incomeâof a person for a calendar year means the personâs income for the year, computed in accordance with the Income Tax Act, except that

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: there shall be deducted from the personâs income for the year, to the extent that those amounts have been included in computing that income,

Subparagraph.Label: (i.1)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount of the payment under the program referred to in section 276 of the Budget Implementation Act, 2021, No. 1,
